title: Torrezx-Prismarine sword
description: Replace the trident with an epic ancient prismarine sword
body:
Torrezx-Prismarine sword

Español:
Espada de las profundidades marinas, capaz de enfrentar al mismisimo Poseidon
Destruye a el rey ahogado, para conseguirla, pero usala con sabiduria.

English:
Sword of the deep sea, capable of facing Poseidon himself. Destroy the Drowned King to obtain it, but use it wisely.

Replace-Reemplaza
-Trident

Requerimientos-Requirements:
-Requiere de Optifine o EMF-Requires Optifine or EMF

Twitter: [Torrezx](https://x.com/TorrezxMC)
